title: Catch Policy, Injected Randomness, Immutable Collection State, and Updates · Contract Defense
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss TypeScript decisions for catch policy, injected randomness, immutable collection state, and updates and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, compile diagnostics, explicit non-claims, and named browser, TypeScript, Node, network, filesystem, terminal, load, accessibility, and production transfer gates.
